codeReview.summary: Commit 07498e8 resolves the timestamp shape/type mismatch, runtime priority/date ordering, and reachable skeleton usage, but it does not resolve the remaining prior blocking issue requiring component-level ActionsPage tests.

issues.description: Prior blocking issue from phase2-actions-page-ui is still unresolved. The suite is still explicitly node/no-DOM and validates helper logic only; it does not import or render ActionsPage, so VAL-UI-014 component-behavior coverage remains unmet.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature assignment used backend-worker for a frontend-focused fix, and handoff marked followedProcedure=true even though backend-worker's RED-first/manual API verification steps were not applicable/executed in this session.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json:1022 sets skillName='backend-worker'; commit 07498e8 changes only client/src/* plus shared/types/actions.ts; backend-worker SKILL.md mandates RED-first test creation and manual API verification not reflected in worker-transcripts.jsonl session 98560459-0c19-4854-888f-b2c48c4efb50.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Validation requires ActionsPage component tests, but the repo test setup is node-only and lacks DOM test tooling, allowing helper-only tests to pass while VAL-UI-014 remains unsatisfied.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-contract.md:57-59 (VAL-UI-014 requires component tests); vitest.config.ts:6 sets test environment to 'node'; package.json has no @testing-library/react or jsdom entries.

summary: Review result: fail. The fix commit resolves timestamp, sort-order, and skeleton findings, but a prior blocking requirement is still open: actions-page tests still do not render ActionsPage or validate required component behavior.
